evals.expected_output: A .http file named user.http in the resolved http/ folder containing @baseUrl/@token variables, a GET request to the list endpoint with pagination query params and an Authorization header, and a comment documenting the available filters. Paths include the correct route-file mount prefix (e.g. /api).

assertions.name: contains-baseUrl-variable
assertions.description: File starts with @baseUrl = http://localhost:8000

assertions.name: contains-token-variable
assertions.description: File declares @token variable

assertions.name: uses-get-with-mount-prefix
assertions.description: Contains a GET {{baseUrl}}/... request whose path includes the correct route-file mount prefix (e.g. /api)

assertions.name: includes-auth-header
assertions.description: Contains Authorization: Bearer {{token}} for authenticated routes

assertions.name: includes-pagination-params
assertions.description: A list/index endpoint appends per_page and page query params

assertions.name: documents-filters-in-comment
assertions.description: A comment line documents the available filters for the GET endpoint

assertions.name: uses-request-separator
assertions.description: File contains ### separator between/after request blocks

evals.prompt: generate the http file for the endpoints in this controller (a create/update controller with a JSON body)
evals.expected_output: A .http file with a POST or PATCH request to the resolved full path, Authorization and Content-Type: application/json headers, and a JSON body whose fields and placeholder values are inferred from the controller's validation rules or FormRequest.

assertions.name: contains-baseUrl-variable
assertions.description: File starts with @baseUrl = http://localhost:8000

assertions.name: contains-token-variable
assertions.description: File declares @token variable

assertions.name: uses-write-method-with-full-path
assertions.description: Contains a POST/PUT/PATCH {{baseUrl}}/... request with the correct full path

assertions.name: includes-auth-header
assertions.description: Contains Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

assertions.name: includes-content-type-header
assertions.description: Contains Content-Type: application/json

assertions.name: json-body-matches-validation
assertions.description: JSON body contains fields inferred from validation rules with sensible placeholder values by type

assertions.name: uses-request-separator
assertions.description: File contains ### separator

evals.prompt: create requests for a controller that registers multiple routes (e.g. index plus a secondary action)
evals.expected_output: A .http file covering every route the controller registers, each with the correct full path and an Authorization header, separated by ### into distinct request blocks.

assertions.name: contains-baseUrl-variable
assertions.description: File starts with @baseUrl = http://localhost:8000

assertions.name: contains-token-variable
assertions.description: File declares @token variable

assertions.name: covers-all-registered-routes
assertions.description: Every route registered for the controller has its own request block

assertions.name: all-routes-have-auth-header
assertions.description: Each authenticated request block includes Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

assertions.name: route-params-use-variables
assertions.description: Any {id}-style route params are turned into @-variables referenced in the URL

assertions.name: uses-multiple-separators
assertions.description: File contains at least two ### separators for separate request blocks
